gigs.title: I will build n8n automations with ai to connect your business tools
gigs.desc:
I build custom n8n automation systems that connect your tools, process data with AI, and run your operations on autopilot.

What I automate:
• Lead capture to CRM pipeline
• Email and SMS follow-up sequences
• Data sync between apps
• AI-powered data processing and summaries
• Webhook triggers and API chains

Every workflow is built, tested, and documented with a video walkthrough.

➔ Also check my AI Chatbot gig
➔ Need everything? See my AI Bundle gig

Message me your current process. I will map your automation in my first reply.
gigs.xsell: CROSS-SELLS TO: Gig #2 (AI Chatbot) • Gig #5 (AI Bundle)

img.headline: N8N AUTOMATION
img.pdfWhat: Custom n8n automation systems with AI. Connect tools, automate data processing, and run operations on autopilot.
